verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We exalt thee We exalt thee We exalt thee, O Lord We exalt thee We exalt thee We exalt thee, O Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I exalt thee I exalt thee I exalt thee, O Lord I exalt thee I exalt thee I exalt thee, O Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are worthy You are worthy You are worthy, O Lord You are worthy You are worthy You are worthy, O Lord
